skill.name: ngx-funnel-criteria
skill.description: Evaluation criteria for NGX funnel audits, including visual identity, UX, copy, checkout, and conversion checks.
skill.summary: Audit NGX landing pages and checkouts with a structured 100-point funnel criteria guide.
skill.author: 270aldo

security_audit.summary: The static analyzer reported seven high-severity weak cryptography matches, but each match is a false positive caused by Markdown text, Spanish words, or CSS-style presentation examples. No scripts, network access, filesystem operations, command execution, credential handling, or prompt injection attempts were found in SKILL.md.

low_findings.title: False Positive Weak Cryptography Matches
low_findings.description: The reported weak cryptography detections are not cryptographic code. They occur in frontmatter, checklist text, color and border guidance, CTA wording, pricing copy, and red-flag descriptions in a Markdown criteria document.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The matched locations are plain Markdown guidance, not executable code or cryptographic operations. The skill contains only one Markdown file and no implementation files that could invoke weak algorithms.

content.value_statement: Funnel reviews can miss brand, UX, copy, and conversion issues. This skill gives Claude, Codex, and Claude Code a structured NGX audit checklist.
actual_capabilities: Scores NGX funnel pages across visual identity, value clarity, copy, UX, and conversion criteria.
Provides separate checklist guidance for lead magnet pages, product landing pages, and checkouts.
Defines a 100-point scoring model with bands for excellent, good, needs work, and critical pages.
Identifies conversion red flags such as hidden CTAs, long forms, slow loading, and broken links.
Checks NGX brand expectations such as primary color, dark backgrounds, card style, and copy rules.
limitations: It does not run automated browser tests or measure live page performance.
It does not inspect screenshots unless the user provides them to the model.
It is tailored to NGX funnel standards and may not fit unrelated brands.
It provides audit criteria, not direct implementation or code fixes.

use_cases.title: Review a Lead Magnet Landing Page
use_cases.description: Audit the hook, lead magnet value, form length, preview content, and CTA strength before launch.

use_cases.title: Evaluate a Product Funnel
use_cases.description: Score a product landing page against NGX visual, messaging, pricing, guarantee, and proof criteria.

use_cases.title: Check a Purchase Flow
use_cases.description: Review checkout clarity, payment visibility, security signals, guarantee placement, and friction points.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Page Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Audit this NGX landing page using the funnel criteria. Give a score, list the strongest areas, and list the most important fixes.

prompt_templates.title: Checkout Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Evaluate this checkout flow with the NGX criteria. Focus on purchase summary, price clarity, payment methods, guarantee, support, and friction.

prompt_templates.title: Copy and Conversion Review
prompt_templates.prompt: Review this funnel copy for NGX messaging standards. Check value clarity, problem framing, solution explanation, prohibited terms, and CTA quality.

prompt_templates.title: Full Funnel Scoring Report
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a full NGX funnel audit for these pages. Score each criteria group, identify red flags, rank fixes by conversion impact, and provide a launch recommendation.

output_examples.input: A lead magnet landing page with a long form and a CTA below the fold.
output: Primary issues: CTA visibility, form length, and unclear lead magnet value.
Recommended fixes: Move the CTA above the fold, reduce the form to email and name, and add a clear content preview.

output_examples.input: A checkout page with a clear payment method list but no visible guarantee.
output: Checkout status: Good with conversion risk.
Strong points: Purchase summary and payment methods are visible.
Main fix: Add the guarantee near the price and final CTA.

output_examples.input: A product landing page using bright cyan accents and broad claims.
output: Messaging risk: Absolute claims should be replaced with specific, supportable outcomes.
Visual fix: Replace prominent cyan with the NGX primary color and dark card style.

best_practices: Provide the page type, target audience, and funnel goal before asking for an audit.
Ask for scores by criteria group so tradeoffs are clear.
Use the red-flag list as a final launch gate before publishing.
anti_patterns: Do not use the checklist as a generic brand audit for unrelated products.
Do not treat the score as a replacement for user research or analytics.
Do not ignore severe checkout issues because the landing page score is high.

faq.question: What does this skill audit?
faq.answer: It audits NGX landing pages, product pages, and checkouts for visual identity, UX, copy, and conversion quality.

faq.question: Does it test a live website automatically?
faq.answer: No. It provides criteria for the model to apply to supplied page content, screenshots, or user descriptions.

faq.question: Can it create a numeric score?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill defines a 100-point scoring model with weighted criteria groups.

faq.question: Is it useful outside NGX projects?
faq.answer: Only partly. The conversion ideas may help, but the visual and copy rules are specific to NGX.

faq.question: What are the main red flags?
faq.answer: Hidden CTAs, forms over five fields, slow loading, broken links, console errors, absolute promises, and off-brand cyan usage.

faq.question: Which tools can use this skill?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
